subject: fix(ui): increase MiniCellGrid fixedHeight sizes (s=44, m=64, l=88)
body:
Previous sizes (s=32, m=44, l=56) were too small to show cell structure
clearly, especially for portrait formats where width shrinks further.
New sizes give enough room for sections and subdivisions to be readable.
